commands.review_summary:
The branch adds snake_case tool-call block recognition to session transcript repair and tool-call ID rewriting, with focused tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for the remaining unique path: current main rewrites tool-result IDs but still ignores snake_case assistant tool-call blocks in tool-call-id.ts, so matching IDs can drift. I did not run a live Feishu/Anthropic interrupted-stream scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Manual follow-up is needed because the remaining blockers are branch refresh/conflict handling and contributor-side real behavior proof, not a narrow automated code repair.
